description: Golden-signal metrics, structured logs, and distributed traces emitted by every service, with SLOs, alerts, and dashboards

golden_signals.description: MUST: Every service exposes the four golden signals: latency, traffic, errors, saturation
golden_signals.latency: histogram in ms, with p50/p95/p99 buckets
golden_signals.saturation: gauge for cpu, memory, queue depth, connection-pool utilization

slo_definitions.availability: 99.9% of requests return non-5xx in any rolling 30-day window
slo_definitions.latency: p99 < 500ms for read paths, p99 < 2s for write paths
slo_definitions.trading_critical_paths: p99 < 100ms for pre-trade compliance and order routing

alert_rules.burn_rate_fast: error budget consumed at >14x rate for 5 minutes triggers page
alert_rules.burn_rate_slow: error budget consumed at >1x rate for 1 hour triggers ticket
alert_rules.saturation_warning: resource utilization > 70% for 15 minutes triggers warning
alert_rules.saturation_critical: resource utilization > 90% for 5 minutes triggers page

metric_recorded_successfully.result: Metric point recorded to the time-series store

given: error budget consumption rate exceeds the fast-burn threshold (14x) for 5 consecutive minutes

then.description: Page on-call engineer with service name, SLO, and current burn rate

given: rolling error budget consumption is below alert thresholds across all windows
request is sampled out based on production sampling rate
trace_dropped_due_to_sampling.result: Trace span is not exported; metrics are still recorded

invalid_metric_name.result: Metric rejected; caller must supply a valid metric name

given: PII redaction filter fails to sanitize a log entry before ship

then.description: Security alert: PII potentially leaked to log pipeline

log_pii_redaction_failed.result: Log entry is dropped; security team alerted for manual review

errors.message: Metric name is missing or malformed.
Log entry rejected due to redaction filter failure.

events.name: metric.recorded
events.description: A metric point was recorded to the time-series store

events.name: slo.burn_rate_exceeded
events.description: An SLO burn rate threshold was exceeded

events.name: logs.pii_redaction_failed
events.description: A log entry failed PII redaction and was dropped

anti_patterns.rule: Do not log raw request bodies containing PII
anti_patterns.why: Logs persist indefinitely, are often shipped to third-party services, and violate POPIA minimization

anti_patterns.rule: Do not use unbounded label cardinality (user_id, trace_id) on Prometheus counters
anti_patterns.why: Cardinality explosion destroys time-series database performance and costs

anti_patterns.rule: Do not alert on raw thresholds without burn-rate windows
anti_patterns.why: Single-point threshold alerts are noisy; SLO burn-rate alerting reflects user impact

anti_patterns.rule: Do not skip instrumentation for background jobs
anti_patterns.why: Silent failures in async workers are a common outage source

anti_patterns.rule: Do not trust client-supplied timestamps on metrics
anti_patterns.why: Clock skew and malicious clients can corrupt the time series

related.reason: Audit entries and observability events are complementary; the audit log is tamper-evident while metrics are high-cardinality
PII redaction in logs and metrics is a POPIA obligation

goals.description: Provide operators with a real-time, low-noise view of system health sufficient to detect, diagnose, and remediate incidents within SLO budgets

success_metrics.measurement: 90th percentile time from alert to resolution
Fraction of pages that correspond to real user impact

constraints.description: PII in logs and metrics must be redacted at source

invariants: all services emit the four golden signals
no PII appears in log stores in plaintext
compliance logs are retained for at least 1825 days
